title: MCSM Items [vanilla]
description: In the original game, you will be able to obtain items from MCSM by renaming items at the anvil.
body:
# English

This resource pack allows you to obtain items from "Minecraft: Story Mode" by renaming objects on an anvil.

List of items and names for the anvil:

### Diamond Tool:
#### Sword:

* OG Ultimate Sword

* Command Sword

#### Axe:

* OG Ultimate Axe

* Command Axe

#### Pickaxe:

* OG Ultimate Pixaxe

* Netflix Ultimate Pixaxe

* Command Pickaxe

#### Showel

* OG Ultimate Shovel

* Command Shovel

#### Hoe

* OG Ultimate Hoe

* Command Hoe

### Netherite Tools:
#### Sword:

* Netherite Command Sword

* Prismarine Sword

#### Axe

* Netherite Command Axe

* Prismarine Axe

#### Pickaxe

* Netherite Command Pickaxe

#### Shovel

* Netherite Command Shovel

#### Hoe

* Netherite Command Hoe

### Bow

* Prismarine Bow

### Nether Star:

* Storm Star

### Carved Pumpkin

* White Pumpkin Mask

* Broken Mask

* Soren Hat 

* VR Helmet

* Ender Mask

* Nurm hat

* PAMA Control Chip

* Hacked Control Chip

* Diving Helmet

* Baby PAMA

### Totem

* Totem of undying → Order Amulet

### Mace

* Prismarine Glove 

* Romeo Gauntlet

* Golden Protocol

### Flint and Steel

* Blue Enchanted Steel 

* Green Enchanted Steel

### Shield

* Slab Shield

* Radar Shield


# Russian

Данный текстур-пак позволит вам получить предметы из игры «Minecraft:Story Mode» при помощи переименования вещей на наковальне.

Список предметов и названий для наковальни:

#### Мечи:

* OG Ultimate Sword

* Command Sword

#### Топоры:

* OG Ultimate Axe

* Command Axe

#### Кирки:

* OG Ultimate Pixaxe

* Netflix Ultimate Pixaxe

* Command Pickaxe

#### Лопата

* OG Ultimate Shovel

* Command Shovel

#### Мотыга

* OG Ultimate Hoe

* Command Hoe

### Netherite Tools:
#### Мечи:

* Netherite Command Sword

* Prismarine Sword

#### Топоры

* Netherite Command Axe

* Prismarine Axe

#### Кирки

* Netherite Command Pickaxe

#### Лопата

* Netherite Command Shovel

#### Мотыга

* Netherite Command Hoe

### Луки

* Prismarine Bow

### Звезда Незера:

* Storm Star

### Вырезаная Тыква

* White Pumpkin Mask

* Broken Mask

* Soren Hat 

* VR Helmet

* Ender Mask

* Nurm hat

* PAMA Control Chip

* Hacked Control Chip

* Diving Helmet

* Baby PAMA

### Тотем

* Totem of undying → Order Amulet

### Булава

* Prismarine Glove 

* Romeo Gauntlet

* Golden Protocol

### Огниво

* Blue Enchanted Steel 

* Green Enchanted Steel

### Щит

* Slab Shield

* Radar Shield
